purpose: Session Fabric R1.2 — the render-declaration layer. Every kind of thing a Claude Code session emits is enumerated here with a render-contract: WHERE it sits (placement), WHAT draws it (component), WHICH fields a UI needs (field_map = output field -> dotted path into the raw event). A declaration is TYPED CONTENT against the closed vocabularies below (registry-is-truth; the future heart ingests this as a registry, never ad-hoc JSON). Lookup law (implemented by runtime/render_declaration.py): exact 'type/subtype' -> family 'type/*' -> bare 'type' -> UNDECLARED (loud, recorded, still rendered as UnknownEvent — never silently dropped). assistant/user content blocks sub-dispatch as '<type>.content.<block.type>' (tool_use further refines by tool name); stream_event sub-dispatches on the inner event; attachment sub-dispatches on attachment.type. A family-fallback hit RENDERS but also records a registry-gap drop (gap-pressure law: constrained operation is a sensor for its registry).
grounding: Real captured stream-json: /home/tim/xsession-tests/{t1/out.jsonl,t1/out2.jsonl,channel-hello/out.jsonl} (T2 harness, real claude). Real transcript corpus: 2,514 files under ~/.claude/projects/ scanned 2026-06-13 (full type/subtype inventory). Atlas docs mirror: claude-code/headless.md + agent-sdk/typescript.md + streaming-output.md (research lane 02-render-declaration.md). Evidence per entry: observed-stream | observed-transcript | atlas-docs | inferred | family-fallback | supervisor-native.

system/init.summary: First event of every stream — the session context snapshot. The UI initialises its session state here; session_id is the resume/fork handle.

system/compact_boundary.summary: Context was compacted — visible divider, never hidden (it explains lost earlier context). Also the R3 timeline's anchor point.

system/status.summary: Transient status: 'compacting' shows an overlay, null clears it; permissionMode keeps the header badge current.

system/api_retry.summary: API retry in progress — banner 'retrying (attempt N/M, waiting Xs)'; clears on next non-retry event.

system/thinking_tokens.summary: Live thinking-token estimate ticks (REAL stream emit, absent from the docs — found in the T2 captures). Feeds the token counter / a thinking-activity pulse; not a thread item.

system/plugin_install.summary: Plugin install progress before init: started -> installed/failed per marketplace -> completed (hide).

system/hook_started.summary: A hook began — collapsible infrastructure annotation keyed by hook_id.

system/hook_progress.summary: Hook stdout/stderr — append into the open hook panel for hook_id.

system/hook_response.summary: Hook finished — seal the panel; outcome=error warns on the parent tool card, cancelled = amber timeout.

system/permission_denied.summary: A tool call was auto-denied (no prompt) — inline denial on the tool card; the model handles it, no user action.

system/task_started.summary: Background task launched (bash/subagent) — open a task panel entry, link from the spawning tool card.

system/task_progress.summary: Background task heartbeat — update tokens/tools/elapsed on the task entry.

system/task_updated.summary: Background task state patch — merge into tasks[task_id]; completed=tick, failed=error, killed=stopped.

system/task_notification.summary: Background task finished — finalize the entry; the next assistant turn reacts to it (link them visually).

system/local_command_output.summary: Output of a local slash command (/usage, /status…) — markdown bubble labeled 'Command output', NOT a model response. The R1.1 slash-command proof reads this.

system/commands_changed.summary: Available commands changed — replace the cached command palette; nothing drawn in the thread.

system/files_persisted.summary: Checkpoint persisted — enables 'rewind to here'; warn if failed non-empty.

system/session_state_changed.summary: INFERRED (SDK union type, no schema in the Atlas mirror — I have not verified this fires): session state/permission-mode changed mid-session; refresh the header badges.

system/api_error.summary: An API error landed in the transcript (status + retry telemetry) — error card with retry context.

system/away_summary.summary: The 'what happened while you looked away' recap — a timeline moment (R8.2 feeds on these).

system/bridge_status.summary: Remote-control bridge status (connected / continue-at URL) — toast with the link.

system/informational.summary: Free-text informational notice (e.g. remote-control disconnects) — toast.

system/local_command.summary: A slash command WAS INVOKED (command-name/message/args markup) — render as the command the operator ran.

system/model_refusal_fallback.summary: A refusal triggered a model fallback/retry — show which model stepped in and why.

system/scheduled_task_fire.summary: A scheduled task fired into this session — timeline moment ('Running scheduled task…').

system/stop_hook_summary.summary: Stop-hook run summary — collapsed; preventedContinuation=true is the notable state.

system/turn_duration.summary: Turn wall-clock telemetry — feeds glance-state (R7.3), not a thread item.

system/*.summary: FAMILY FALLBACK for an unlisted system subtype: renders loud as a generic notice AND records a registry-gap drop (gap-pressure) — rendered, never silently dropped, never green-painted as exact.

user.summary: A user turn. String content renders as the user bubble; array content sub-dispatches per block (tool_result/text/image/document). parent_tool_use_id non-null nests it under the spawning Agent tool card.

user.content.tool_result.summary: A tool's result fed back — update the matching open tool card (collapsible output; is_error flags it red).

user.content.text.summary: A text block inside an array-content user turn — markdown in the user bubble.

user.content.image.summary: An image the user attached — render the image (source carries base64/url).

user.content.document.summary: A document attachment block — render as a file chip.

user.content.*.summary: FAMILY FALLBACK for an unlisted user content block — rendered loud + drop recorded.

assistant.summary: An assistant message envelope — content blocks sub-dispatch below; usage accumulates into the token counter; stop_reason=tool_use means more turns incoming; parent_tool_use_id nests subagent replies.

assistant.content.text.summary: Assistant prose — markdown in the assistant bubble (stream-appended live when partials are on).

assistant.content.thinking.summary: Thinking block — collapsible disclosure; empty thinking = redacted (placeholder, never hidden).

assistant.content.redacted_thinking.summary: INFERRED (API block type; not yet observed in this corpus): fully-redacted thinking — show the redaction placeholder.

assistant.content.tool_use.summary: A tool call — open a tool card (name + formatted input), pending until the matching user.content.tool_result arrives. MCP tools read as mcp__<server>__<tool>.

assistant.content.tool_use.AskUserQuesti.summary: Interactive question — BLOCKS the loop until answered; options render as buttons (multiSelect honored); the answer returns as its tool_result.

assistant.content.server_tool_use.summary: A server-side tool call (e.g. advisor) — 'consulted' indicator with collapsed result.

assistant.content.advisor_tool_result.summary: The advisor's reply — styled distinctly from regular tool results.

assistant.content.fallback.summary: A fallback content block (observed 24x in the real corpus, undocumented) — render its raw content loud; shape varies.

assistant.content.*.summary: FAMILY FALLBACK for an unlisted assistant content block — rendered loud + drop recorded.

stream_event/message_start.summary: Open a new streaming assistant message — reset block accumulators; record ttft.

stream_event/content_block_start.text.summary: Open a text block — begin the streaming cursor at this index.

stream_event/content_block_start.thinkin.summary: Open a collapsed live 'Thinking…' disclosure at this index.

stream_event/content_block_start.tool_us.summary: Open a tool card early (name known before the input finishes streaming).

stream_event/content_block_start.*.summary: FAMILY FALLBACK: an unlisted streamed block type opened — loud + drop recorded.

stream_event/content_block_delta.text_de.summary: Append delta.text to the open text block in real time — THE voice seam taps these (R5.1).

stream_event/content_block_delta.thinkin.summary: Append to the live thinking disclosure.

stream_event/content_block_delta.input_j.summary: Accumulate the tool input JSON as it streams — live input preview on the tool card.

stream_event/content_block_delta.*.summary: FAMILY FALLBACK: an unlisted delta type — loud + drop recorded.

stream_event/content_block_stop.summary: Seal the block at this index (finalize accumulated text / parse the tool input).

stream_event/message_delta.summary: Message-level delta — update stop_reason + output token count.

stream_event/message_stop.summary: Seal the streaming message — remove the cursor; the full assistant event follows.

stream_event/*.summary: FAMILY FALLBACK for an unlisted inner stream event — loud + drop recorded.

result/success.summary: The turn's terminal event — close the working state; cost badge + turns; stop_reason=max_tokens warns truncation; permission_denials surfaces the denial tally. A few trailing events (prompt_suggestion) may still follow.

result/*.summary: Terminal ERROR result (error_max_turns / error_during_execution / error_max_budget_usd / error_max_structured_output_retries) — error state labeled by subtype with the errors array. A declared family by design (the error subtypes share one shape), not a gap.

tool_progress.summary: Long-running tool heartbeat — 'Running: 12.4s' on the matching card.

tool_use_summary.summary: A collapsed batch header over the listed tool cards.

rate_limit_event.summary: Quota signal: allowed=silent, allowed_warning=utilization gauge + reset countdown, rejected=prominent. R11.2 quota-aware scheduling reads the same fields.

auth_status.summary: Auth flow in progress — modal streaming output lines; blocks until resolved; error surfaces loud.

prompt_suggestion.summary: Predicted next prompt (after result, with --prompt-suggestions) — ghost text in the composer.

attachment/hook_success.summary: Transcript-layer hook success (the stream's hook_response analogue) — collapsed hook annotation.

attachment/hook_non_blocking_error.summary: A hook failed non-fatally — amber annotation with stderr.

attachment/hook_cancelled.summary: A hook timed out — amber 'cancelled' annotation.

attachment/hook_system_message.summary: A hook surfaced a system message — toast.

attachment/hook_additional_context.summary: A hook injected context into the session — collapsible 'context injected' note.

attachment/task_reminder.summary: The session's current task list snapshot — meta row, collapsed.

attachment/queued_command.summary: A queued user command awaiting its turn — meta row.

attachment/deferred_tools_delta.summary: Lazy tool loading changed the tool set — meta note (internal scaffolding, visible on demand).

attachment/mcp_instructions_delta.summary: MCP server instructions loaded/unloaded — meta note.

attachment/skill_listing.summary: Skills available to the session — meta note; feeds the session header's skill count.

attachment/invoked_skills.summary: Skills invoked this turn — meta note.

attachment/command_permissions.summary: Per-command tool permissions in effect — meta note.

attachment/edited_text_file.summary: An external edit to a tracked file — diff-snippet card (the file changed under the session).

attachment/file.summary: A file attached into context — file chip.

attachment/compact_file_reference.summary: A file referenced across a compaction — chip linking pre-compact context.

attachment/date_change.summary: The date rolled over mid-session — a thin timeline divider.

attachment/nested_memory.summary: Memory content loaded from a nested path — 'memory retrieved' note.

attachment/task_status.summary: A task status snapshot — task panel update.

attachment/plan_file_reference.summary: The plan file's content referenced — collapsible plan view.

attachment/async_hook_response.summary: An async hook's late response — hook annotation (found via the family-fallback drop sensor, 2026-06-13).

attachment/goal_status.summary: A goal/sentinel condition status — meta note (drop-sensor find).

attachment/workflow_keyword_request.summary: A workflow keyword request marker — meta note (drop-sensor find).

attachment/*.summary: FAMILY FALLBACK for an unlisted attachment type — rendered as a generic meta note + drop recorded.

summary.summary: A conversation summary row (transcript sidecar) — feeds the session dossier/title.

agent-name.summary: The session's agent name — registry/dossier field, not a thread item.

agent-setting.summary: The session's agent setting — registry field.

ai-title.summary: The auto-generated title — the catalog's display label (R7 renames override with custom-title).

custom-title.summary: The operator-set title — wins over ai-title everywhere.

file-history-snapshot.summary: Checkpoint/rewind bookkeeping — powers 'rewind to here', not drawn.

last-prompt.summary: Pointer to the conversation leaf — resume bookkeeping, not drawn.

mode.summary: The session's mode row — header badge source.

permission-mode.summary: Permission mode change row — header badge updates from these.

pr-link.summary: The session created/linked a PR — dossier link chip (also --from-pr's join key).

worktree-state.summary: The session runs in a worktree — dossier/registry field (where its work actually lands).

init.summary: Supervisor wire: the owned session initialised (claude_session_id captured).

text.summary: Supervisor wire (legacy condensed): assistant text. The declared stream alongside carries the full contract — this stays for existing consumers (schema-additive).

tool.summary: Supervisor wire (legacy condensed): a tool call happened.

injected.summary: Supervisor wire: a turn was injected into the session's stdin.

interrupt_sent.summary: Supervisor wire: a control_request interrupt was written to the session.

done.summary: Supervisor wire: the injected turn completed (the condensed result).

closed.summary: Supervisor wire: the owned session closed (teardown/exit/watchdog) — reason carries the cause.

keepalive.summary: Watch-stream keepalive — connection plumbing, never drawn.

declared.summary: The declared-event envelope itself (the R1.2 wire shape) — consumers unwrap it; it is not re-rendered.
